title: stelis discolor
intro: Stelis discolor, a species of orchid native to Central and South America, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Stelis discolor are attributed to its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce pain, inflammation, and the risk of infection. The plant is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and topical creams, allowing for a range of applications in traditional medicine.
